expectedFindings.semanticSummary: BlockedEmail.should_block_email? method has side effects during a read operation - it updates statistics even when just checking if an email should be blocked. This could cause race conditions in concurrent environments and makes the method name misleading.
Regex pattern @(#{domains}) only matches domain suffixes, not full domains. evil.example.com would match whitelist entry example.com.

expectedNoFindingZones.reason: Fixture preamble and unchanged scaffolding should not produce review findings.
